prestazioni: Engine: Replace the original 7.3L V12 (engine code: **Phantom III L-head V12**) with a fully built **JE Pistons forged 10.5:1 compression ratio slugs** (92mm bore, 90mm stroke) paired with **Manley Performance I-beam connecting rods** and a **Crower billet crankshaft** to handle 850+ hp on **VP Racing Fuels Q16** with a **Bosch Motorsport 0280158802 high-flow fuel pump** and **Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors**.

Forced Induction: Twin **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers** (86mm inducer, 110mm exducer) with **Tial MV-R 60mm wastegates** and **Precision Turbo & Engine 50mm external wastegate dump tubes**, feeding into a **custom 4.5-inch stainless steel intercooler piping system** with **PWR North America bar-and-plate intercooler core** (1200cfm airflow capacity).

Drivetrain: **ZF 8HP95 8-speed automatic transmission** (from the Rolls-Royce Cullinan) with a **PML SD-300 torque converter** (3000+ stall speed) and **South Bend Clutch dual-disc organic/metallic hybrid clutch** for the **custom 4WD conversion** (using **Quattro GmbH Haldex Gen 5 differential** and **GKN Driveline CV joints**). Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins TTX46 coilovers** (adjustable damping, 3-way compression/rebound) and **Eibach Pro-Race sway bars** (28mm front, 25mm rear) for chassis rigidity.
estetica: Body: **Liberty Walk LB Works Phantom III widebody kit** (handcrafted aluminum over carbon fiber, 4-inch fender flares) with **custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap** (military-spec PPF for rocker panels). Front splitter and rear diffuser by **Vorsteiner** (carbon fiber, 3-piece modular design) with **Aeromotions active rear wing** (hydraulic, 3-position angle adjustment).

Wheels: **HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels** (22x12 front, 22x13 rear, +35mm offset) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** (305/25R22 front, 325/25R22 rear). **Brembo GT-R 6-piston calipers** (405mm two-piece rotors) with **Ferodo Racing DS3.1 brake pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake lines**.

Interior: **Recaro Pole Position carbon fiber seats** (HANS-compatible, 6-point harnesses) with **Schroth Profi II-6 belts**. **Momo Prototipo steering wheel** (suede, quick-release hub) and **Motec C127 dash logger** (integrated with **AEM CD-7 digital dash**). **Rolls-Royce Bespoke Division** custom **aluminum shift paddles** (anodized gold) and **Bowers & Wilkins Diamond Series speakers** (18-speaker, 2400W amplifier) with **DSP tuning by AudioControl LC-1.1K**.
